text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Autsch... I got careless.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's my fault for being so inattentive... I should
have been more thorough with my warm-up
exercises...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: At this rate, my next race may be in jeopardy...
choice_data_list:
There's no need to rush. Just take the time to
recover.
We can still make it if we try.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But if I do nothing but rest, my body condition
will steadily decline.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll be fine if I only do a little bit of
training...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I suppose...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: You're right.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will rest now so I can recover more quickly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash looks disheartened as she commits
herself to resting quietly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Right... I mustn't give up so easily.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's adjust my schedule to focus on light
workouts and stretching for now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I can still continue training if we do that.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: There is no need to worry. Obser—

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ngh! Ouch...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Moving so quickly made her injury even worse.
Full recovery is going to take a while.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
With things as they are, we should make a
practice schedule that takes my injury into full
consideration.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
First, we must reconsider my diet and sleep
schedule. After that, we'll have to put together
some easy workouts...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Visualization training would also be a valuable
tool for conditioning my mind.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Right! Let's put a new schedule together right
away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After sticking to her light training regimen, Eishin
Flash manages to make a full recovery!
